fields.acceptance_criteria: Port hypergraph, overlay/effects, scene3d, theme settings, and debug surfaces to Dioxus without duplicating viewer-api logic.
fields.title: [LOG-5e] Port log-viewer visualization tabs and overlay-backed tooling to viewer-api-dioxus
fields.validation_plan: Run cargo check for log-viewer-dioxus plus manual tab/overlay/theme smoke checks under trunk serve.
